because.text: Adjudicated: the round's constructive spine, adopted nearly verbatim. P1-A settlement-ignorant verifier confirmed (Warrant s9 cited, enforced nowhere) -> adoptions count only in the descendant closure of the pinned root. Binding+cardinality+lineage design shipped whole: profile hash-pins threshold, under is exactly one profile + one threshold, current profile derived by walking profile adoptions each authorized under the policy being replaced (s5.1 current-policy rule applied to governance). Your T'-min_sigs-1 arithmetic is a pinned negative fixture. Deprecation sequence (never-1-of-1) and bootstrap attack classes adopted. Not adopted: mandatory profile supersede on rotation - lineage consumption already retires the old profile; open to the verification pass.

subject.note: GPT-5 ADR-007 gate review 3/3 (blind): gate-worthy with P1s
